TPU ELASTIC CORD

Elastic cord made with high quality TPU; it is thin, light and 100% recyclable, With high durability and elasticity it is perfect to use for a wide range of applications. Our TPU elastic cord is free from latex and is non-toxic, making it suitable for use in garments and fashion accessories.

TPU ELASTIC CORD
